tnc.allTcApply: ALL UWIN33 GENERAL TERMS & CONDITIONS APPLY.

supremeTnc:
How to Participate?

  • All UWIN33 members are eligible to participate in this event.
  • Members may obtain a maximum of two (2) tickets per day through Daily Missions.
  • Tickets are earned based on accumulated deposits that meet the required milestone tiers.
  • Daily Missions reset every day at 12:00AM ({{timeZone}}).

Daily Mission Structure

  • Two (2) Daily Missions are available each day.
  • Each mission rewards only one (1) ticket.
  • Each mission contains three (3) milestone tiers.

    Mission 1

    • Bronze – {{currency}} {{ft0}} daily total deposit
    • Silver – {{currency}} {{ft1}} daily total deposit
    • Gold – {{currency}} {{ft2}} daily total deposit

    Mission 2

    • Bronze – {{currency}} {{st0}} daily total deposit
    • Silver – {{currency}} {{st1}} daily total deposit
    • Gold – {{currency}} {{st2}} daily total deposit
  • Total deposits made within the same day will be accumulated and used to determine the milestone tiers achieved for both Mission 1 and Mission 2.
  • Once a milestone is reached, members may manually claim one (1) ticket from any unlocked tier, up to the highest milestone achieved within that mission.

Automatic Claim System

  • If a reward is not manually claimed before the daily reset (12:00AM {{timeZone}}), the system will automatically claim the ticket based on the highest milestone achieved.
  • After the automatic claim is processed, all mission progress will reset for the new day.

How to Play the Uspin33 Mini Game?

  • Members may use their available tickets and click the Spin Now button at the center of the wheel to play.
  • All cash prizes will be automatically credited to the member’s wallet.
  • Each ticket corresponds to the selected wheel tier (Bronze, Silver, or Gold) when claiming the mission reward.
  • Tickets must be used before {{endTime}} ({{timeZone}}).
{{physicalPrizeList}}

How to Withdraw

  • Members must complete a 1x turnover (real bet) of the prize amount before a withdrawal can be made.

Example:

  • Prize Amount = {{currency}} 2,688
  • Required Bet = {{currency}} 2,688 x 1 = {{currency}} 2,688

Turnover Exclusions

  • All products are available for play using the claimed bonus. However, the following are excluded from turnover calculation:
    1. Draw Results
    2. Betting Both Sides
    3. Voided/Canceled Games
    4. Bet 24 numbers or above within ONE (1) round/match in Roulette games
    5. Bet placed Containing selection of odds less than 0.5 or 1.50 (Decimal Odds)
    6. 3 Pictures, Casino Hold'em, Poker Games
    7. RNG/Arcade/Fishing Games
    8. 4D Lottery
supremeTncMega888: • Mega888 Non-Slots Games including Arcade, Fishing, Table Card Games (Electronic & Live Casino) are not allowed to play with this bonus claimed. Once found, winning amount will be forfeited.
